name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Fort Worth, TX: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 2514 W Berry St offers fast car title loans to local residents seeking quick cash.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans operates at 2514 W Berry St #1 in Fort Worth, TX, providing convenient access to quick car title loan services. The Fort Worth location is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM and Saturday 10AM to 5PM, closed on Sundays. This standalone storefront makes it easy for West Side Fort Worth residents to stop in during convenient hours.

At this Fort Worth, TX location, you can apply for car title loans with your vehicle as collateral. The team handles the application process quickly and can often approve loans same-day. Call +1 360-667-1615 to ask questions, get a quote, or schedule an appointment.

If you need quick cash against your car in Fort Worth, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and your vehicle keys and title. Montana Capital specializes in helping borrowers access funds fast when traditional lending isn't available.
address: 2514 W Berry St #1, Fort Worth, TX 76109

company_info.headquarters: 2514 W Berry St #1, Fort Worth, TX 76109

pros: Loan ceiling of $50,000 — significantly higher than typical storefront title lenders
Same-day funding available; multiple reviewers report cash within one hour of approval
No credit check and no hard inquiry; bad credit and bankruptcies explicitly accepted
Free pre-approval in under 5 minutes with no credit score impact
Borrower keeps the vehicle and continues driving during the repayment period
Operating since 2007 with 375,000+ reported customers — established track record
Online applications available 24/7 with in-person branch pickup option
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed anywhere on the website
Vehicle repossession risk if the borrower defaults — collateral is the car title
Funds disbursed as a Bank of America check, not cash — inconvenient for unbanked borrowers
Only 59 Google reviews despite claiming 375,000 customers served — thin verifiable social proof
Title loans are among the highest-cost loan products; typically carry triple-digit APRs
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor credit or past bankruptcy who cannot qualify for personal loans
Borrowers needing more than $1,000 quickly who are ineligible for payday alternatives
People who own their car outright or have significant equity and need same-day cash
Borrowers comfortable with secured lending who are confident in their repayment ability
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best suited to vehicle owners with poor or no credit who need fast access to cash above what payday lenders offer and cannot qualify for personal loans. The main caveat is that the company does not disclose its rates or APRs publicly, and title loans as a product class carry high costs and vehicle repossession risk — borrowers should exhaust lower-cost options first.
services: Title loans for borrowers with prior bankruptcies
Flexible repayment plans based on borrower income
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 2514 W Berry St, Fort Worth, TX. Fast same-day car title loans.
